profile.name: Gokul Loganathan
profile.title: Full Stack Java Developer
profile.bio: Building scalable enterprise applications with Java 17, Spring Boot & Angular. Turning complex problems into elegant, high-performance solutions. Recognized for 25–50× performance improvements.
typingPhrases: I build Java REST APIs & Services

achievements: Developing dynamic web app for government vehicle-export approvals across 23+ countries using Angular, TypeScript, and RxJS.
Designed secure REST APIs with Java 17, Spring Boot, Spring Data JPA & Spring Security for distributed systems.
Leveraging GCP (Firestore, Cloud Storage, App Engine) for microservices deployment.
Delivered 25-50x performance improvement on 1.2M-document MongoDB dataset — 2-3 min to 3-6 sec.
Automated compliance document generation, eliminating all manual formatting effort.
High Achiever Award – Ford Intern City of Tomorrow Challenge, Ford NextGen 2023.
Built RESTful/OpenAPIs with Java 17, Spring MVC, Spring Data JPA & Spring Security.
Implemented CI/CD pipelines: Maven, Git, Jenkins with JUnit & Playwright test suites.
Integrated Google Cloud Services with Java for file upload/download from Cloud Storage.
